2053.name: Oaken Forest
2053.description: The dense forest of oak prohibits travel to the south, and makes it all but impossible to the west. A steep cliff rises above the forest to the east, further preventing passage. The dense undergrowth thins slightly to the north, alongside a cave in the cliff.

2054.name: Beside a Small Cave
2054.description: Large oaks spring up all about, alongside a massive wall of rock to the east, and at the base of a steep band of forest that ascends the cliff to the north. The mouth of a large cave gapes open at the foot of the cliff a few hundred feet to the east. You have lost 864 experience.

2055.name: Among the Light Firs
2055.description: The chilling air rasps at your flesh among the light sprinkling of firs high up the cliff here. To the east, the vast wall of stone rises once more, and just to the west, the sheer cliff drops to the oaken valley floor below. A few of the oaks can be seen further down the hill to the south, beside a cave.

2647.name: Subterranean Chamber
2647.description: Stoney blackness surrounds you deep within the earth in this natural chamber. The ceiling is high, barely perceivable, and the slabby walls halt all exit save for the tunnel to the west. A few items of furniture lie scattered about the chamber, providing a place of living for the subterranean dweller.

2650.name: Under the Kitchen
2650.description: Rusted rungs lead upward to a trapdoor in the tiled ceiling of this passageway. The hall leading northward is lined with rotting statues of granite, testimonials to Talinesians long ago forgotten in the decadence of the current dynasty.

2646.name: Natural Tunnel
2646.description: Black, velvet darkness shrouds your eyes deep under the earth, and the stale air is chilling to the core. The rough stone walls of the natural tunnel bend ninety degrees here, leading southward into the darkness and widening eastward into an underground chamber. You have lost 864 experience.

2648.name: Secret Passageway
2648.description: Dusty slabs tile the floor of this hidden walkway, long ago forgotten in the passing of time. Cobwebbed statues line the hall in ancient glory, testament to valiant elven warriors and rulers of old. The memorial corridor continues southward.

2649.name: Secret Passageway
2649.description: Statues line this passageway, carved with hauntingly accurate detail. Cobwebs hang from the tiled ceiling in droves, indicating the secrecy of the halls in which you walk. No Talinesian has been here for years, perhaps centuries.

2645.name: Within a Small Cave
2645.description: The musky odor of a bear's living place assaults your nostrils, immediately alerting you to danger. The cave is smaller than it first seemed and there is nothing remarkable, except to the north, where a natural tunnel runs deeper into the cliff. The light of the outdoors pours in through the mouth to the west. You have lost 432 experience.

2688.name: The Talinesian Forest
2688.description: The gloom within the forest is oily black, almost tangible. A small stone wall runs through the forest to the south, guarding the vast palace that lies beyond. Gatehouses break the continuity of the wall to the southeast and southwest, and the forest spreads out in all other directions.

2689.name: The Talinesian Forest
2689.description: The undergrowth and trees of the dark forest are dense, making travel difficult, but not impossible. A gatehouse can be seen to the south, guarding a lush garden and palace beyond. The gloom of the forest continues to the east and west, and rays of light pierce the canopy along a trail to the north.

2690.name: The Talinesian Forest
2690.description: Towering firs surround you with their dark glory, reaching high into the heavens above. Some distance to the west, the ground drops vertically several hundred feet to a wooded slope below. The cliff-top is met by a small stone wall to the southwest, which continues eastward through the forest, blocking travel to the dense forest to the south. The tightly-knit canopy subsides to the north above a thin trail seen between the firs.

3671.name: The Great Hall
3671.description: Long tables stretch from wall to wall, completely covered in all manner of lavish food. The mouth-watering aromas of fresh venison, duck, quail, sugared yams, frosted cakes, exotic fruits, cheeses, fine wines, and all other imaginable delights reach your nose, much to the annoyance of your stomach. The feast continues throughout the great hall to the east and south.

3669.name: Western Gatehouse
3669.description: Ample space within this gatehouse exists for combat, allowing the Talinesians to easily outnumber the more defensive Erinesian on their occasional raids. Beyond the sanctity of the gatehouse and its guards lies the sprawling gardens of a magnificent palace seen some distance to the south. You spin about and stab an elven gateguard with your dagger! (31) The ocean's energy begins to flow through you, granting you the speed of a gentle current.

3670.name: Palace Gardens
3670.description: All manner of lush flowers and shubbery grow within this splendid garden, their aromas mingling with the scent of fir from the forest beyond the gatehouse to the north. The gardens continue to the east, and the gate to the palace lies just south of there. A delicate golden flower opens toward the sky, its petals catching the light.

npcs.name: Elf maiden
npcs.description: thin form.  Truly, the beauty of the elf is unmatched.

3672.name: Servant`s Quarters
3672.description: Worn curtains cover the windows of this sleeping room, reducing light to a minimum. Simple beds of wood and cloth provide a place for the servants to get as much sleep as is allowed of them. The mundane room is otherwise bare.

2651.name: Cluttered Kitchen
2651.description: Chaos reigns within this cluttered kitchen. Great clouds of steam and smoke billow upward from the fiery stoves and boiling water. Plates are dropped, food is spilled, but more than enough is prepared for the massive feast in the great hall. This kitchen gives meaning to the phrase, "Too many cooks spoil the broth. "

2652.name: Servant`s Hallway
2652.description: Nondescript and boring, this hall serves little purpose but to provide a way for the servants to more efficiently provide service to the noble class. The passageway opens up into the great hall to the north and leads to a set of stairs further to the south. A bustling kitchen can be seen to the west. You have lost 364 experience.

npcs.name: Palace guard
npcs.description: A guard of the palace stands here guarding the entrance to the council chambers. You might want to think of a good reason for being here if you intend

2653.name: Servant`s Hallway
2653.description: Layers of dull cream wallpaper cover the walls and ceiling of this unremarkable hallway. The worn red carpet continues northward and southward along the passageway, and an opening to the west leads to a room filled with beds.

npcs.name: Servant
npcs.description: beaten a few too many times; who has been broken by the lash.

2654.name: Base of the Staircase
2654.description: Shining marble stairs descend from above and meet the hallway here. Conditions seem to improve above, and you suppose that guests are simply meant to ignore the filth of the servant's hall as they make their way to the cleanly floors above. The servant's hallway continues northward.

2664.name: The Great Hall
2664.description: The bright lights of the hall shower the feast in golden glory, highlighting the lords and ladies as they engage in social banter. The grand event continues within the great hall to the north and east, and the servant's hallway runs southward.

2666.name: The Great Hall
2666.description: An epic feast occurs around you, creating a dull roar as the lords and ladies of Talinesia gorge themselves with fine foods and regurgitate the latest gossip at the top of their lungs. The tables of the great hall continue in all directions save for north, where the fine red curtains of the palace's entrance hall can be seen.

2667.name: Entrance Hall
2667.description: Extravagant curtains drape the entrance hall in crimson glory, mingling with the carpet to form a motif of royal red. The sounds of a massive feast assail your ears from the great hall to the south, and the gardens of the palace grow in all their splendor outside of the gate to the north.

2668.name: Palace Gardens
2668.description: Beautiful flowers spring up in carefully designed patterns all around. The masterful gardeners have become expert at the art of landscaping, likely having been passed down the knowledge from times less troubled. The gate to the Talinesian palace stands to the south, beyond the guard.

2669.name: Palace Gardens
2669.description: Lush grass grows underfoot, carefully tended with immaculate detail by gardeners of vast expertise. Shrubs and flowers spring from well mixed loam, providing perfect fertilization for the blooming buds that scatter their color across the beautiful gardens. A delicate golden flower opens toward the sky, its petals catching the light.

2670.name: Eastern Gatehouse
2670.description: Surprisingly bare, the gatehouse appears to be little more than a deterrent for enemy invaders. The Talinesians seem to have spent more of their resources in offensive campaigns, perhaps an overconfident move.

2671.name: The Talinesian Forest
2671.description: Small squirrels and other wildlife scamper through the forest beneath the gloom of the towering firs. The dense canopy of branches prevent light from reaching the forest floor, eliminating undergrowth, leaving the ground covered with naught but a layer of needles.

3673.name: Training Courtyard
3673.description: A large oak tree stands in the center of the courtyard, providing shade for the training soldiers. Oak is not native to such a high altitude; this was most likely imported from the Gnome forest some distance to the west. Dust hangs in the air, kicked up by the sparring soldiers and other activities. The pleasant courtyard continues to the east and south, and an entrance to the palace lies to the west. You have lost 1092 experience.

2656.name: Wide Hallway
2656.description: The hallway in which you stand is wide enough to allow eight guards to surround you and kill you. An opening in the eastern wall leads out into a pleasant courtyard, shaded by a sprawling oak tree. The mundanely decorated hall leads north and south.

3675.name: Training Courtyard
3675.description: Many instruments of combat training litter the courtyard, from target dummies for javelin throwing to rotating contraptions for lancing. The majority of the soldiers seem to be gaining skill by sparring though. The courtyard is bounded by a wall to the north and east, but sprawls out in all other directions.

3676.name: Training Courtyard
3676.description: Two large stone walls to the east and south hem in the pleasant shaded courtyard. Implements of combat training line the walls, ready for use by the Talinesia soldiers. The army seems well trained, and it's a wonder they haven't run over their foes long ago.

2662.name: Wide Hallway
2662.description: Some ten feet wide, the hallway allows ample space for the guards of the palace to patrol without impeding travel for guests. Pleasant watercolor paintings line the walls, picturing nothing of much substance. A wolf here, some boars there, not very exciting. The hallway continues southwards and leads into an office to the north.

2655.name: Second Floor Landing
2655.description: Sparkling clean marble stairs lead downward into the lower halls of the palace here. The carpet of this landing is of crimson and gold; very regal in appearance. Bare walls lead northward and southward into a wide hallway in both directions.

3674.name: Soldier`s Barracks
3674.description: Hundreds of bunks line the wooden walls of these barracks. Belongings are all neatly organized, beds all made, and shoes all shined. The soldiers of the Talinesian army must be very strictly regulated and inspected for such cleanliness to be so apparent.

2657.name: The Hidden Stairs
2657.description: What's this? Massive cobwebs dangle in the gloom, sticking annoyingly to your face and clothing. No one's been here for years, at least not anyone that cared to clean. A set of stone stairs lead indeterminately up into the darkness.

3677.name: Training Courtyard
3677.description: A towering tree of oak provides welcome shade in this dusty courtyard. Battered weapons and armor are piled against the south and west walls of the courtyard; useless trinkets. The sounds of training can be heard from the rest of the courtyard to the north and east.

2663.name: Guard Captain`s Office
2663.description: A large drawerless desk sits in the middle of this office, piled high with those useless papers that so often seem to find their way to desks. Two bare wooden chairs sit against the eastern wall, probably for the purpose of interrogating wrong-doers. A wide hallway leads southwards through the palace.

2658.name: The Hidden Stairs
2658.description: Stone steps lead downward into the dank, gloomy blackness of the palace. Bare brick walls lead southward, layered with insects and cobwebs. A thin passageway leads into the darkness beyond.

2659.name: Hidden Passageway
2659.description: Slime mold clings perilously to the bare stone walls of this passageway. Dust covers the floor, evidence of this walkway's infrequent use. The stone walls lead westward into a flashing laboratory, and lead eastward into a wall panel.

2660.name: Lavish Hallway
2660.description: The lush carpet of this extravagant hallway pads your footfalls as you walk, easing your aching bones. The outline of a panel can be seen behind some paintings on the west wall, and an ordinary door lies to the east. Beautiful carpet leads north and south.

2661.name: The Secret Laboratory
2661.description: All manner of apparatuses tower over you within this grim laboratory. Lightning flashes from ball to ball overhead, part of some monstrous mechanical contraption. The acrid smell of sulfur pervades your nostrils, reminding you of that rotten egg you had for lunch three days ago. A stone passageway leads east, and a cell door lies in the western wall.
